data.title: Treatment Results for Patients With Central Centrifugal Cicatricial Alopecia (CCCA): a Multicenter Prospective Study
data.brief_summary: The objective of this study is to examine photos of CCCA patients taken before and after treatment to compare treatment outcomes between different treatment groups
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* African-American women, ages 18-60 years old
* with a clinical diagnosis and biopsy-proven CCCA, with Central Scalp Alopecia Scale severity 1 through 4 will be included in this study
* These subjects will be seen and treated in Wake Forest Baptist Health Dermatology Outpatient
endpoints: Central Scalp Alopecia Photographic Scale in African American Women
Central Scalp Alopecia Photographic Scale in African American Women
